title: "The Founder" Assignment
description: Grab your popcorn and watch the Founder (2016) — a movie about the emergence and growth of McDonald's. Please answer the 5 multiple-choice questions. The questions evaluate your understanding of the topics discussed in class so far.
descriptionText: Grab your popcorn and watch the Founder (2016) — a movie about the emergence and growth of McDonald's. Please answer the 5 multiple-choice questions. The questions evaluate your understanding of the topics discussed in class so far.

questions.text: The McDonald brothers' original restaurant was based on a system that could be considered a form of a lean startup. Which of the following aspects of their restaurant reflects the lean startup approach?

answers.text:
528

    
         
      
        Avoiding customer feedback – Sticking to their original idea and not adjusting based on customer preferences.
        
      
    
    
      
    
    
      Avoiding customer feedback – Sticking to their original idea and not adjusting based on customer preferences.
